description: Implement the trapnet/ module (Flask tracking server, browser fingerprinting, honeypot baits, IP geolocation), bot/ module (Telegram bot command handler with all commands, inline keyboards, notification system, PDF report generator, alert manager), and scheduler/ module (APScheduler task management with all scheduled tasks).
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/trapnet/flask_server.py with Flask app: tracking endpoint that logs visits, serves redirect page with fingerprint JS, captures IP/UA/referer, stores BioLinkVisit in database. Routes: GET /<tracking_code> (main trap), POST /api/fingerprint (receives JS fingerprint data). CORS disabled, minimal response to avoid detection.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/trapnet/fingerprinter.py with Fingerprinter class: generate_tracking_page() returns HTML with embedded JS that collects screen resolution, timezone, language, platform, color depth, touch support, WebGL renderer, then POSTs to /api/fingerprint. generate_fingerprint_hash(data) creates SHA-256 from collected features. same_device_check(hash1, hash2) returns similarity percentage.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/trapnet/honeypot.py with HoneypotManager class: generate_unique_tracking_url(user_id) creates unique short codes per target, schedule_bait_story(target_time) posts story at predicted optimal time, evaluate_bait_results() analyzes which baits were triggered. Bait types: BIO_LINK_BAIT, STORY_MENTION_BAIT, TIMED_STORY_BAIT, UNIQUE_LINK_BAIT.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/trapnet/geolocator.py with GeoLocator class: locate_ip(ip_address) returns country/city/region/lat/lon using geoip2 (with fallback to ip-api.com free API), get_location_summary(ip) returns human-readable string, bulk_locate(ip_list) batch processes IPs.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/bot/handler.py with full Telegram bot command handler using python-telegram-bot library. Implement ALL commands: /start, /add, /remove, /targets, /score, /report, /pdf, /heatmap, /predict, /top5, /stories, /patterns, /alerts, /settings, /pause, /resume, /status, /dashboard, /backup. Each command checks MY_TELEGRAM_ID authorization. Use ConversationHandler where needed.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/bot/keyboards.py with all InlineKeyboardMarkup builders: main_menu_keyboard(), target_action_keyboard(user_id), alert_level_keyboard(), settings_keyboard(), confirm_keyboard(). Use emojis as specified in the architecture.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/bot/notifier.py with Notifier class: send_alert(alert) sends formatted alert via bot to MY_TELEGRAM_ID, send_daily_report(report) sends daily summary, send_story_notification(viewer) instant story view notification. Respects quiet hours and duplicate suppression.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/bot/report_generator.py with ReportGenerator class using reportlab: generate_user_report(user_id) creates full PDF with cover page, score summary, story view table, online timeline table, heatmap visualization, score history graph, pattern analysis section. generate_daily_summary() creates daily overview PDF. Returns file path.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/bot/alert_manager.py with AlertManager class: create_alert(type, severity, user_id, message) creates Alert record, process_pending() sends unsent alerts respecting rules (max 2/hour per user, quiet hours 00:00-08:00 for non-CRITICAL, 30min duplicate suppression). Severity levels: INFO, WARNING, HIGH, CRITICAL.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/scheduler/task_manager.py with TaskManager class wrapping AsyncIOScheduler: init_scheduler() configures all jobs, start()/stop() lifecycle, add_job()/remove_job() dynamic management.

Create /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/scheduler/tasks.py with all scheduled task definitions: every 30s story check, every 60s online check, every 5min anomaly detection + alert processing, every 1h score update + prediction update, every 6h deep analysis + profile rebuild, daily 03:00 backup + archive, daily 21:00 report generation + sending, smart task for predictive bait posting when stalker probability > 70%.
acceptance_criteria: Flask trap server handles tracking requests and stores visit data with fingerprints
All 18+ bot commands are fully implemented with proper authorization checks
PDF report generator creates actual PDF files using reportlab (not placeholders)
Alert manager respects rate limiting, quiet hours, and duplicate suppression rules
Scheduler configures all specified intervals correctly
Honeypot generates unique tracking URLs per target
All functions have type hints and docstrings, no TODOs
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro && python -c "from trapnet.flask_server import create_flask_app; from trapnet.fingerprinter import Fingerprinter; from trapnet.honeypot import HoneypotManager; from trapnet.geolocator import GeoLocator; print('Trapnet OK')"

cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro && python -c "from bot.handler import setup_bot_handlers; from bot.keyboards import main_menu_keyboard; from bot.notifier import Notifier; from bot.report_generator import ReportGenerator; from bot.alert_manager import AlertManager; print('Bot OK')"
cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro && python -c "from scheduler.task_manager import TaskManager; from scheduler.tasks import register_all_tasks; print('Scheduler OK')"
cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro && python -m py_compile bot/handler.py && python -m py_compile trapnet/flask_server.py && echo 'Compile OK'
findings: All 11 files implemented and verified. aiohttp added to requirements.txt as it was needed by geolocator but missing. All imports resolve correctly and py_compile passes. ReportLab PDF generation verified with actual PDF output. No tests exist yet in tests/ directory so no test failures.
